MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th November, 2009 - . G.S.R. 826(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 6 and section 25 of e Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes e following rules further to amend the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, namely:— (1) These rules may be called the Environment (Protection) Seventh Amendment Rules, 2009. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules), in rule 3, in sub-rule (3B), for the words, brackets, figures and letters, “in columns (3) to (5) of Schedule VII”, the words, brackets, figures and letters “in columns (4) and (5) of Schedule VII” shall be substituted. 3. For Schedule VII to the said rules and entries relating thereto, the following Schedule and entries shall be substituted, namely:— o “[SCHEDULE VII] [See rule 3(3B)} NATIONAL AMBIENT AIR QUALITY STANDARDS S. Pollutant Time Weighted Conceatration in Ambient Ajr No. Average Industrial, Ecologically Methods of Measurement Residential, Rurat | Sensitive Area : and Other Area (uotified by Central Government) )] [e)) (3) 4 &) . Note.— Whenever and wherever monitoring results on two consecutive days of monitoting exceed the limits specified above for the respective category, it shall be considered adequate reason to institute regular or continuous monitoring and further investigation.”. [F. No. Q-15017/432007-CPW] RAJNEESH DUBE, Jt. Secy. Note.— The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide number S.0.844(E), dated the 19% November, 1986; and subsequently amended vide numbers S.0. 433(E), dated the 18" April, 1987; G.S.R. 176 (E), dated the 2™ April 1996; and were recently amended vide numbers G.S.R. 97(E), dated the 18" February, 2009; G.S.R. 149(E), dated the 4™ March, 2009; G.S.R. S12(E), dated the 9" July, 2009; G.S.R. S43(E), dated the 22™ July, 2009; G.S.R. 595(E), dated the 21™ August, 2009; and G.S.R. 794(E), dated the 4" November, 2009.
